profiles.about_me: Results-driven Civil Engineering professional with over 3 years of hands-on experience in high-rise residential and commercial construction. Proven track record in end-to-end project supervision from drawing review and contractor coordination to quality control and timely delivery. Adept at managing multi-stakeholder construction sites, enforcing safety standards, and optimizing resources to minimize waste. Committed to delivering projects that meet the highest standards of structural integrity and client satisfaction.

work_experience.description: Reviewed all types of project drawings, including RAJUK, Architectural, Structural and Perspective plans, identifying discrepancies and coordinating with relevant departments for timely corrections. Supervised day-to-day construction activities on-site, ensuring work is executed as per drawings, specifications, and schedule. Coordinated and instructed contractors to execute work according to the planned work program. Prepared monthly work schedules, achievement reports and monitored daily progress to maintain project timelines. Conducted on-site training for workers to enhance skills and ensure superior construction quality. Inspected material quality, enforced safety protocols and ensured the security of both construction activities and workforce. Focused on minimizing material wastage through proper handling and execution oversight. Ensured effective project merchandising and branding throughout the construction period. Maintained high standards of construction quality, ensuring timely project completion and client satisfaction.
work_experience.title: Assistant Project Engineer

work_experience.description: Gained practical experience in rural infrastructure projects, including road and bridge construction. Assisted in field inspections and site supervision under the guidance of senior engineers. Studied engineering drawings and construction documentation relevant to government projects. Developed understanding of project estimation, BOQ preparation and tender evaluation processes. Learned about quality control practices, safety measures and environmental considerations in civil works. Participated in meetings and site visits that deepened understanding of public infrastructure planning and implementation.
work_experience.title: Engineering Intern

profiles.address: House #263, Satarkul Road, Uttar Badda, Dhaka
profiles.about_me: A dynamic and achievement-oriented Civil Engineering professional with over 7 years of hands-on experience in project management, site supervision, construction execution, and quality assurance. Proven ability to deliver infrastructure, commercial, and residential projects on time and within budget. Skilled in team leadership, vendor coordination, risk management, and ATS-compliant reporting. Seeking a Probationary Officer or Management Trainee role to leverage technical expertise, strategic planning, and operational excellence in a growth-oriented organization. Strong administration, organizing, and time management skills with the ability to work under pressure and handle confidential matters. Always ready to learn new technologies; a strong team player with solid analytical reasoning and problem-solving skills. Self-motivated, assertive, and possessing excellent communication skills with a positive, balanced, and professional demeanor. A smart, young, energetic, and dynamic self-starter with an outgoing personality and strong interpersonal skills, capable of working independently at a high pace.

work_experience.description: Supervised daily construction activities ensuring alignment with project timelines and milestones. Monitored site compliance with technical drawings, safety standards, and quality specifications. Maintained work schedules based on BOQ and coordinated with subcontractors to resolve issues. Controlled project budgets and certified bills for labor, contractors, and material suppliers. Prepared daily and weekly progress reports for senior management and stakeholder review. Managed material procurement and liaised with supply chain teams to prevent delays.
work_experience.title: Assistant Project Engineer (Civil)

work_experience.description: Developed and maintained civil layout plans for refugee camp construction projects. Ensured work progressed per Master Project Schedule and BOQ specifications. Supervised skilled mason and labor teams to maintain productivity and safety compliance. Certified vendor and contractor bills while managing daily site activity reporting. Coordinated material requisitions with supply chain to support uninterrupted construction.
work_experience.title: Assistant Project Engineer (Civil)

work_experience.description: Oversaw civil layout engineering and installation for multi-story building projects. Monitored contractor performance and certified completion-based billing accurately. Executed structural works including piling, foundations, RCC, and finishing systems. Managed onsite activities for water tanks, retaining walls, slabs, beams, and sanitary works.
work_experience.title: Site Engineer (Civil)

profiles.digital_skills: Proficient in Project Management Tools (AutoCAD 2D & 3D, MS Project, Microsoft Word, Excel) and Construction Software (AutoCAD Civil 3D, MS Office Suite, Estimating Software).

(B) Must have successful completion of at least 1 number of 4 storied RCC building work(in/c civil,sanitary, electrification works) of Government / semi�Government / autonomous organization of Bangladesh during last 05 years amounting minimum Tk.1100.00 Lakh in a single Contract during last 05 years. (C) The Tenderer shall have a minimum average annual construction turnover amounting Tk. 1800.00 Lakh. This must be supported by total certified payment received for contracts in progress or work complete under Government / semi- Government / autonomous organization of Bangladesh during last 05 years. Interested tenderer are requested to provide payment certificate mentioning Fiscal year and share percent (in case of JVCA) in the certificate. (D) Tenderer must have a Minimum Liquid Assets/Credit facilities/Credit Line(unconditional) Tk. 400.00 Lakh (Must be Issued Within publication of IFT in egp system to The Last Date of Lodgment of The Tender and must be followed by the appropriate format (PW3-7)). (E) Minimum Tender Capacity must be Tk. 1300.00 Lakh. (ii) Valid VAT Registration Certificate. Please follow the instructions stated in TDS , PCC , ITT , GCC , section 2,4,6, 7, 8, 9 (document tab) of this tender. Other Notable Terms & conditions are pointed out at TDS, PCC, ITT & GCC. candidate.address: House #263, Satarkul Road, Uttar Badda, Dhaka
candidate.about_me: A dynamic and achievement-oriented Civil Engineering professional with over 7 years of hands-on experience in project management, site supervision, construction execution, and quality assurance. Proven ability to deliver infrastructure, commercial, and residential projects on time and within budget. Skilled in team leadership, vendor coordination, risk management, and ATS-compliant reporting. Seeking a Probationary Officer or Management Trainee role to leverage technical expertise, strategic planning, and operational excellence in a growth-oriented organization. Strong administration, organizing, and time management skills with the ability to work under pressure and handle confidential matters. Always ready to learn new technologies; a strong team player with solid analytical reasoning and problem-solving skills. Self-motivated, assertive, and possessing excellent communication skills with a positive, balanced, and professional demeanor. A smart, young, energetic, and dynamic self-starter with an outgoing personality and strong interpersonal skills, capable of working independently at a high pace.

ranked.reasoning: Md. Humayun Kobir has 7.5 years of solid experience in civil engineering project management and site supervision in Bangladesh, including multi-story buildings, providing a strong technical foundation to understand tender requirements. However, his experience is primarily with private firms, not explicitly with Government of Bangladesh projects, and he lacks the senior-level strategic or financial expertise needed for a high-level consultancy role, as well as any indication of international experience required for the UK location.
strengths: Substantial (7.5 years) experience in project management, site supervision, and construction execution
Experience includes structural works and multi-story building projects
Strong technical background with digital skills in project management and estimating software
Experience in budget control and bill certification for labor, contractors, and material suppliers
gaps: Experience not explicitly with Government of Bangladesh (GOB) or semi-GOB projects of the specified scale
Lacks senior-level expertise or strategic/financial understanding of large tenders (e.g., assessing contractor turnover, liquid assets)
Total experience (7.5 years) is still below the 10 years general experience benchmark for contractors
No international experience or stated ability to work in the UK

candidate.about_me: Results-driven Civil Engineering professional with over 3 years of hands-on experience in high-rise residential and commercial construction. Proven track record in end-to-end project supervision from drawing review and contractor coordination to quality control and timely delivery. Adept at managing multi-stakeholder construction sites, enforcing safety standards, and optimizing resources to minimize waste. Committed to delivering projects that meet the highest standards of structural integrity and client satisfaction.

ranked.reasoning: MD RIADDUZZAMAN is too junior with only 3 years of experience for a consultancy role advising on large GOB tenders, especially with a World Bank client. While he has exposure to GOB through an LGED internship, his primary experience is with a private developer, and he lacks the deep understanding of GOB tender specifics or the financial aspects required for contractor evaluation. His resume also contains confusing dates regarding his current employment.
strengths: Exposure to Government of Bangladesh (GOB) through LGED internship
Basic understanding of tender evaluation processes
Direct experience with high-rise residential construction technical aspects
Experience in site supervision and quality control
gaps: Primary experience not explicitly with Government of Bangladesh (GOB) projects, except for an internship
Insufficient financial evaluation knowledge for large tenders (e.g., turnover, liquid assets)
No international experience or stated ability to work in the UK
Confusing dates in work history (current role listed as starting in 2026)
